Container.Name: VibraVid
Container.Overview: VibraVid - Web UI for managing video downloads. The database (/app/GUI) and config (/app/Conf) live in Docker named volumes (vibravid_gui, vibravid_conf) because those container paths also contain image-shipped source code that bind mounts would shadow. Downloads and logs use normal bind mounts to /mnt/user. NOTE: the container runs as UID 1000, so the Downloads and Logs host paths must be writable by UID 1000 (chown -R 1000:1000 those folders before first start). Named volumes inherit the correct ownership from the image automatically.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the VibraVid web interface.

Config.Name: Django Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret key for Django sessions/CSRF. CHANGE this to a long random string before exposing the app.

Config.Name: Allowed Hosts
Config.Description: Comma-separated hostnames/IPs allowed to reach the app. Add your Unraid IP, e.g. localhost,127.0.0.1,192.168.1.50

Config.Name: CSRF Trusted Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated origins trusted for CSRF. Must include the exact scheme://host:port you use to reach the WebUI.

Config.Name: Django Debug
Config.Description: Enable Django debug mode. Leave false for normal use.

Config.Name: Watchlist Auto-Download Interval
Config.Description: Optional. Interval in seconds between watchlist auto-downloads (e.g. 14400 for 4 hours). Leave blank to disable.
